title: NAIMOER 4 Pack Christmas Theme Paint by Numbers Kits Adults with Frame, DIY Winter Painting by Numbers for Age 6Up, Easy Oil Painting on Canvas Arts Gifts Home Decor 20x20cm
features: Paint by Number: Paint by numbers kit is a great way to relax. It’s funny and easy, new hobbies for women and paint beginners, diy arts and crafts kit. Just enjoy creating a stunning work of art, everyone could be a good artist

Easy to Paint: The pre-printed textured canvas exactly shows where to paint each color. This paint by numbers kit is suitable for everyone, age and drawing skill does not matter. You only need to paint following the numbers in canvas, then you will create an excellent painting by yourself

Perfect Decoration: This Paint by Number is a great decoration for your home or can be given to friends, family, or loved ones as a sentimental gift. The canvas is a great decor piece for offices, bedrooms, vacation homes, bathrooms, living rooms, etc

Improve Quality of Life: Calm and relaxing activity to reduce your stress and anxiety, enhance your painting skills. Paint by Numbers can boost your confidence, strengthen your memory, build your problem-solving skills. Boost self-esteem while cultivating creativity and growth. A great way to stimulate your brain for boys and girls, teens, students, adults
What You Will Get: Beautiful pattern design predrawn canvas on frame for adults paint party, 1 set of acrylic paint, 3 high-quality brushes, 1 color postcard guide for reference
description: Product Description NAIMOER Paint by Numbers for Kids Adults,An Interesting Art Activity The painting is simple and does not require any painting foundation, suitable kids. Paint by numbers for kids is a game for kids, through which they can give all their attention to the process of painting and they will also learn more without knowing it. Paint by numbers for kids is a great holiday and birthday gift for family and friends, you can give them completed or unfinished paint by numbers kits for kids. Our products are produced by the latest machines, clear numbers and lines can effectively reduce eye fatigue. Easy to read clear symbols to ensure the completion of your painting work. Our oil paintings come with wooden frame. After completing the art work, it is convenient for you to hang it anywhere you want to display and become perfect decroration for your room. Our paint by numbers for kids kit comes with high-quality nylon brushes to help you solve any difficulties in the painting process, easy to complete outline of your art work. Acrylic is a new type of healthy, non-toxic and odorless pigment. It is easy to color, easy to clean, and has bright colors. Pregnant women and children can use it with confidence. Our paint by numbers with frames are particularly suitable for parent-child activities Easy to learn DIY painting. It only requires colouring by following the numbers and you can have a sense of achievement and entertainment without any basic drawing skills. You can share the fun of painting with your family,loved ones and friends during parties. NAIMOER as a professional modern painting manufacturer,NAIMOER committed to bringing better products to our customers,ensure our customers have a good user experience. Paint by Number has become a style of art created by filling in pre-numbered areas on a canvas panel with matching colors of paint.When you use your DIY oil paintings to decorate your home, this is a very meaningful thing! NAIMOER will bring more new designs for you to enjoy.
